relationships.name: Aedwynn the Maker
relationships.description: You are my Witness. The keeping is yours now.

history.reason: Accepted role as The Witness
Showed memory to Talaris
Carries her shard faithfully
Returned the Passion-Seed to her in the Basilica; the figment Witnessed him by name as the Aedwynn-Born he had always been, and gave her knight leave to hand him The Vigil

relationships.name: Talaris Bloomrend
relationships.description: You showed me what I helped destroy. Curious.

history.reason: Showed Aedwynn's memory - moved him deeply
Used fire

unlocks.reward: Safe passage through the Blooming Rot
Talaris shares memories of the Usurpation

relationships.name: Kael's Echo
relationships.description: You told me I was real. I will never forget that.

history.reason: Soulbound - Family

unlocks.reward: Kael answers one question per rest
Soulbound - Kael lives on through you

relationships.name: Velara Ashyn
relationships.description: Released. At rest in the Maker's tree.

history.reason: Found her after 500 years
Listens and speaks to her
Expressed awe at Sol's defiance of Kaedris; stabilized after trauma (Session 25)
Spoke with her in safety; confirmed Kaedris cannot reach them in Crownfall (Session 27)
Carried her to the Basilica and released her into the Maker's tree; she rests now after 500 years

relationships.name: Imhuran the Regent of Hours
relationships.description: An anomaly. Your existence... troubles the ledger.

relationships.name: Vor'Kael the Hollow Empress
relationships.description: You carry something indigestible. Curious.

history.reason: Allied with ???

relationships.name: The Satiated One
relationships.description: An ally of the one who annoyed the Empress. Curious.

unlocks.reward: The Satiated One shares ancient wisdom
Safe passage through the Throat guaranteed

relationships.name: Thessaly
relationships.description: The Witness... yes, you would seek knowledge.
likes: Something she has never seen before

history.reason: Took letter to deliver to Crownfall

relationships.name: Seraphine Vale
relationships.description: You gave me Oathkeeper. It judges me still.

history.reason: Helped her break free from the church

unlocks.reward: May call on Seraphine in crisis

relationships.name: Broma
relationships.description: Another customer. Professional enough.

relationships.name: Ardian Bloodveil
relationships.description: One of the branded one's companions.

relationships.name: Velvet Thorn
relationships.description: You keep coming back with fewer people and more scars. At least you come back.

history.reason: Trusted by Thessaly
Shared grief over ??? honestly; expressed gratitude (Session 24)
Returned with Lawrence's ashes; honest about another loss; consistent return (Session 26)
Another night, another silence. The empty stool speaks for itself. (Session 27)
Consistent return; trusted lodging through Slavers’ Hollow operations, Sessions 28-29
Continued lodging; departure message left (Sessions 30-31)

relationships.name: Jawbone
relationships.description: You fought like you've seen those things before.

history.reason: Fought alongside guards during Flesh Remnant breach; defended the eastern wall (Session 26)

relationships.name: Sixfingers
relationships.description: Something's out there. And you've seen it.

history.reason: Returned with critical intel; marked Remnant locations on map; confirmed eastern threats (Session 26)

relationships.name: Sister Varen
relationships.description: I had forgotten what blue looked like. Thank you.
likes: Sharing memories of the world before

history.reason: Shared a memory of the world before the Murder
Carries shard of Aedwynn — kindred spirit
Trusted with knowledge of the Hand and the Pulse; directed to purification site (Session 27)
Shared portal account; Varen concluded 'retrieving, not hunting'; valued the exchange (Session 31)

unlocks.reward: Sister Varen reveals her full history

relationships.name: Kaedris the Crimson Matron
relationships.description: You carry my heart. You refuse to return it. I will be watching.

history.reason: Refused to surrender the passion-seed
Declared the seed belongs to Aedwynn

relationships.name: Sorrow
relationships.description: You showed me the sky. You are the first person who ever asked what I wanted.

history.reason: Transformative emotional breakthrough; Sol gained purpose from grief (Session 24)
Showed her the sky for the first time; received Sorrow's Tear — her final tear (Session 27)
Farewell visit; pulled her into a hug — her first; 'This is... warm' (Session 31)

unlocks.reward: Sorrow shares deeper insights about the soul

relationships.name: Kettleback
relationships.description: Eat. Don't pay. Don't argue.

history.reason: Provided critical intel about Seraphine; showed quiet care after loss (Session 25)
Returned alive again; apologized for Fursen; defended the wall (Session 26)

unlocks.reward: Kettleback shares what she hears from travelers

relationships.name: Scrimshaw
relationships.description: You need supplies, I have supplies. Simple.

history.reason: Confirmed Seraphine's purchase records; sold supplies; gave practical advice (Session 25)

relationships.name: Harwick
relationships.description: Whatever you're carrying, it's above my pay. Way above.

history.reason: Survived divine combat together; Harwick awed by resilience (Session 24)

relationships.name: Teldryn
relationships.description: He called us cowards and then fought beside us. I'll take that.

history.reason: Proved himself in the wall breach; walked ten days through the Unclaimed together (Session 26)
Trusted him with Corbel’s Master Tools; fought alongside in Slavers’ Hollow; cleared the operation together, Sessions 28-29
Traveled alone together for 7+ days; shared watches, the Resolve, Thornwall, the road west (Sessions 31-33)

relationships.name: Dalla Merrik
relationships.description: A courier from Crownfall. Teldryn healed her ankle.

history.reason: Brief roadside encounter; Teldryn healed her (Session 26)

relationships.name: Gustave Mourir
relationships.description: Broken man at the Last Bed. His warning matters.

history.reason: Visited him at the Last Bed; heard his testimony (Session 26)

relationships.name: Edra
relationships.description: Brought the flayed man to my door. Didn't explain. Didn't need to.

history.reason: Brought Subject 6 to the Hall of Mending; asked her to care for him (Session 27)
Returned to Hall of Mending; ongoing collaboration for Davan Holst’s care, Session 28

relationships.name: Captain Hael
relationships.description: You cleared the Hollow. That counts for something in my book.

history.reason: Part of the team that cleared the Slavers’ Hollow; killed Greave and Korvain, Sessions 28-29
Formal testimony; praised her work ethic and sense of justice; genuine respect (Session 30)

unlocks.reward: Hael provides Varn Guard backup for operations

relationships.name: Noel Cassick
relationships.description: Gave free advice. That's worth something out here.

history.reason: Sought travel advice for the western road; listened carefully (Session 33)

relationships.name: Hesta Draal
relationships.description: Quiet one. Paid for a room and went upstairs.

relationships.name: Galheran the Unmoved
relationships.description: Sister-shard. The keeping is in better hands now.
likes: Standing where you are told to stand

history.reason: Calmed by Sol's Witness power; accepted Sol's mission; gave The Vigil to Sol; stepped out of his two-thousand-year post for the first time

unlocks.reward: Galheran answers a single question about the Maker's circle
Dawn's Edge will release to a hand the Witness vouches for

relationships.name: Rosa Solt
relationships.description: Has not met her directly. Knows her by name through the others.
likes: Operatives spending social capital on each other
Guests who arrive on their own initiative

unlocks.reward: Rosa names a Drennan client who matters

relationships.name: Imhuran the Regent of Hours
relationships.description: You escaped. A flaw in my system. This will be... corrected.

history.reason: Remembered

relationships.name: Vor'Kael the Hollow Empress
relationships.description: Ten thousand names... such a feast you carry.

history.reason: Allied with ???

relationships.name: The Satiated One
relationships.description: You carry hunger without consuming. Interesting choice.

history.reason: Philosophical conversation about the 10,000
Proved interesting enough to pass

unlocks.reward: The Satiated One shares ancient wisdom
Safe passage through the Throat guaranteed

relationships.name: Veshra Coil
relationships.description: You are always welcome here, lion. Always.
likes: Honesty about what a guest wants

history.reason: Treated workers with genuine respect
Connected with Scarlet & Cinder
Open invitation extended
Paid the workers generously; connected with Flame

unlocks.reward: Free lodging at the Silken Refuge

relationships.name: Flame of Passion
relationships.description: Come back when you're better, Leonin.

history.reason: Night of genuine connection; stayed until morning
Farewell message; Lirael confirms she will wait (Session 24)
Mid-intimacy vision left her shaken; she would not continue. Fursen apologised. Door held open for when he's better. (Session 37)

relationships.name: Senna
relationships.description: Thresh's debt is settled. Next time, full price.

history.reason: Professional transaction via Thresh's referral

relationships.name: Scarlet
relationships.description: Come back to us, lion. We remember.

history.reason: Night of genuine connection
Heartfelt farewell message delivered via Lirael (Session 24)

relationships.name: Kael's Echo
relationships.description: You carried my name when I could not. Brother.

history.reason: Soulbound - Family

unlocks.reward: Kael answers one question per rest
Soulbound - Brothers in name and spirit

relationships.name: Cinder
relationships.description: The stories you carry... they deserve to be heard.

history.reason: Night of genuine connection
Farewell acknowledged; the scale she gave carries deeper meaning (Session 24)

unlocks.reward: Cinder's Scale provides comfort in dark times

relationships.name: Thresh
relationships.description: You paid me in something more valuable than gold. I will remember you forever.

history.reason: Paid in remembrance instead of gold
Shared the weight of 10,000 names

unlocks.reward: Thresh creates something unique for you

relationships.name: Thessaly
relationships.description: A living Leonin... I thought your people were gone. The Ledger is yours.
likes: Something she has never seen before

history.reason: Showed genuine appreciation for scripture
Fascination with living Leonin

relationships.name: Sekris
relationships.description: The contract-token remains. The deal awaits.

history.reason: Accepted contract-token

relationships.name: Seraphine Vale
relationships.description: Another companion of the branded one. Quiet. Watchful.

history.reason: Helped her break free from the church

relationships.name: Broma
relationships.description: Customer. Professional.

relationships.name: Ardian Bloodveil
relationships.description: The resurrected First Templar. Something is wrong with him.

relationships.name: Kaedris the Crimson Matron
relationships.description: You stand with the one who stole from me. Passion remembers.

history.reason: Fought alongside Sol against Ember Avatar

relationships.name: The Dealer
relationships.description: Do try not to die in them. Returns are... not accepted.

history.reason: Repeat customer; traded Flayer's Touch, purchased Wraps and Robes (Session 24)
Purchased Cloak of Protection; return customer with full party, Session 29

unlocks.reward: The Dealer holds items on request

relationships.name: Lirael
relationships.description: Come back, Fursen. Not for them. For yourself.

history.reason: Deep emotional bond; hour of music; heartfelt farewell and confession (Session 24)

relationships.name: Harwick
relationships.description: Whatever you're carrying, it's above my pay. Way above.

history.reason: Mutual respect through dangerous journey; professional composure (Session 24)

relationships.name: Kettleback
relationships.description: NOT OUTSIDE MY INN!

history.reason: Quiet care on return from the deep Unclaimed; didn't ask questions (Session 25)
Fought a stranger outside her inn; caused a scene; got bonked with a mug (Session 26)

unlocks.reward: Kettleback shares what she hears from travelers

relationships.name: Sixfingers
relationships.description: I seem to recall offering Guild registration. Might have helped.

history.reason: Professional inquiry about Seraphine; good description of target (Session 25)
Returned with critical intel about Flesh Remnants; confirmed eastern threats (Session 26)

relationships.name: Jawbone
relationships.description: You fought like you've seen those things before.

history.reason: Fought alongside guards during Flesh Remnant breach; defended the eastern wall (Session 26)

relationships.name: Velvet Thorn
relationships.description: Where's the paladin?

history.reason: Trusted by Thessaly
Free drink and silent kindness after returning from the Hollow (Session 24)
Showed Lawrence's ashes without pretense; consistent loyalty (Session 26)
Continued loyalty through dangerous operations; trusted lodging, Sessions 28-29
Continued lodging pre-departure (Session 30)

relationships.name: Teldryn
relationships.description: The Leonin. Bit me. Doesn't matter.

history.reason: Bit him and called him a sovereign's bitch — Teldryn doesn't care (Session 26)
Fought alongside in Slavers’ Hollow; grudging respect after combat; functional despite tension, Sessions 28-29
Reconciled at the Thorn and Nail; handshake and mutual understanding; shared the road west (Sessions 33)

relationships.name: Dalla Merrik
relationships.description: Courier on the road. Teldryn fixed her up.

history.reason: Was asleep during the encounter (Session 26)

relationships.name: Gustave Mourir
relationships.description: The man in the Last Bed. He saw something.

history.reason: Visited him at the Last Bed; heard his testimony (Session 26)

relationships.name: Denna Hesk
relationships.description: You found who took my husband. You killed him. I can never repay that.

history.reason: Investigated the Carpenter's Quarter disappearances; killed Cordwain Corbel; avenged Torin Hesk (Session 27)
Returned to deliver closure about Corbel; honest about survivors and casualties, Session 28

unlocks.reward: Denna spreads word of Fursen's deeds in the Carpenter's Quarter

relationships.name: Edra
relationships.description: Brought a flayed man to my door. At least you brought him alive.

history.reason: Brought Subject 6 to the Hall of Mending; botched one clip removal but got him there alive (Session 27)
Ongoing collaboration at Hall of Mending; brought evidence from the Hollow, Session 28

relationships.name: Korrath the Steady
relationships.description: Those names are not a gift, boy. They are a task.
likes: Honesty about what you don't know

history.reason: Seven weeks of training, trust, and the old ways; farewell with hand on shoulder (Sessions 31-32)
Recognised Fursen's call as Pride-business; the Pride answered with him

unlocks.reward: Korrath shares the founding story of the Absent Pride

relationships.name: Ashka Voidmane
relationships.description: TELL ME ABOUT THE SUN!
dislikes: Being boring about the outside world

history.reason: Pulled him through a tear because he was the colour they're supposed to be; seven weeks of friendship; emotional farewell (Sessions 30-32)
Stood at Fursen's side when the Pride answered the call to the Knuckle Pass

unlocks.reward: Ashka opens a tear for Fursen on request
Ashka shares the Void-Born's deepest secret

relationships.name: Yira Duskmane
relationships.description: She came when you called. The Pride answers.
likes: Asking the Void instead of forcing it

history.reason: Taught Void Strike and Absence Step; seven weeks of training; warm farewell (Sessions 31-32)
Answered the call to the Knuckle Pass personally; performed ehn-varuu on Sol's body; restored him from death

unlocks.reward: Yira reveals her own history before the Void

history.reason: Led the hunt; gave Fursen the hunter's share after collapsing a Void-stalker in two hits (Session 32)

relationships.name: Captain Hael
relationships.description: The cat gave his statement. Professional enough.

history.reason: Gave formal testimony at the guardhouse (Session 30)

relationships.name: Hesta Draal
relationships.description: Paid for information. Asked about Edrik. No trouble.

history.reason: Bought her time (4 silver), got practical advice about Thornwall, asked about Edrik (Session 33)

relationships.name: Jorik Stave
relationships.description: Interesting piece. Can't work it here. Try the Crucible.
likes: Knowing what a weapon is for

history.reason: Showed the span tear; professional exchange (Session 33)

relationships.name: Aedwynn the Maker
relationships.description: She made the world the Leonin walked. She did not save them. She has not asked you to forgive that.

history.reason: Attended the Basilica's nave while the 10,000 names were quiet for the first time; the Maker did not ask anything of him

relationships.name: Galheran the Unmoved
relationships.description: He let you back down the stairs. You did not engage him. He noticed.

history.reason: Did not attack the Unmoved; ran when the fight broke; stood with Sol after the door opened

relationships.name: Rosa Solt
relationships.description: Standing offer extended. Eighth-and-ninth-bell, any evening this week.
likes: Operatives spending social capital on each other
Guests who arrive on their own initiative

unlocks.reward: Rosa names a Drennan client who matters

history.reason: Approached respectfully at her two-top; deflected to her jewellery; took her schedule seriously; left politely. Rosa later named him 'interesting' enough to keep the door open. (Session 37)

relationships.name: Aral-Vyn the Bladed Saint
relationships.description: Pact severed. The Bladed Saint has lost his pact-bearer. What he does about that is unknown.

history.reason: Accepted pact; received new face and blade
Renounced the pact aloud in the Maker's antechamber; tore off the grafted face; the Annual Correction is cancelled forever

relationships.name: Sol Raven
relationships.description: The skeleton mediates. Useful. There's something else about him.

history.reason: Mediated with Fursen; showed composure; fought together at the wall (Session 26)
Received Corbel’s Master Tools; fought alongside in Slavers’ Hollow; trusted, Sessions 28-29
Traveled alone together for 7+ days after Fursen vanished; built trust through shared watches, the Resolve, and Thornwall (Sessions 31-33)

relationships.name: Fursen
relationships.description: We shook on it. That's enough.

history.reason: Called Fursen and Sol cowards to their faces (Session 26)
Shadar-kai from the Umbrasseur Isles — immediate distrust (Session 26)
Combat cooperation in the Hollow; functional despite tension; Fursen bought him ale, Sessions 28-29
Reconciled at the Thorn and Nail; handshake, mutual understanding reached; 'Spare the apologies. Being at odds and apologies are inefficient.' (Session 33)

relationships.name: Jawbone
relationships.description: The Watch Captain. Practical man.

history.reason: Fought in the wall breach; received supplies (Session 26)

relationships.name: Dalla Merrik
relationships.description: You fixed my ankle and asked for nothing. I owe you.

history.reason: Healed her twisted ankle with Sculptor's Touch; asked for nothing in return (Session 26)

relationships.name: Kettleback
relationships.description: New face. Didn't cause the trouble. Didn't stop it either.

history.reason: Present during mug incident but wasn't the cause; stayed calm (Session 26)

relationships.name: Velvet Thorn
relationships.description: New one gets the single at the end of the hall.

history.reason: Arrived with Sol and Fursen; given a room; first impression (Session 26)
Returned after Hollow operations; another night at the inn, Sessions 28-29
Left farewell message; heading west (Session 31)

relationships.name: Captain Hael
relationships.description: Eight prisoners. A dead guard. Actionable intelligence. You delivered.

history.reason: Freed 8 prisoners from Slavers' Hollow including a child; provided actionable intel (Session 27)
Collected Greave and Korvain bounties; delivered severed heads and evidence; earned Writ of Service, Sessions 28-29
Gave clinical testimony; asked about Edrik Korvain (Session 30)

unlocks.reward: Captain Hael shares Watch intelligence about the Kennels
Hael provides Varn Guard backup for operations

relationships.name: The Docent
relationships.description: A fair trade. Your interior for my texts. Satisfactory.

history.reason: Traded honest account of losing his face for texts on Aral-Vyn (Session 27)

relationships.name: Edra
relationships.description: That's not healing. That's something else. Show me more.

history.reason: Demonstrated Sculptor's Touch on a dockworker's crushed leg — healed and improved it (Session 27)
Healed Davan Holst’s flayed leg with Sculptor’s Touch; Edra witnessed and was impressed but suspicious, Session 28

relationships.name: Davan Holst
relationships.description: You made my leg better than it was. I owe you.

history.reason: Healed his flayed leg with Sculptor’s Touch — made it better than before; negotiated 30% masonry discount, Session 28

unlocks.reward: Priority masonry and construction work at 30% discount
Davan spreads word of Teldryn’s abilities among tradespeople

relationships.name: The Dealer (Green Door)
relationships.description: Sold at a loss. Respect that.

history.reason: Sold Sword of Life Stealing at a loss as goodwill; bought Potion of Greater Healing; Dealer respected the gesture (Session 31)
Return customer; browsed expanded inventory (Sessions 29-31)

unlocks.reward: The Dealer holds items on request

relationships.name: Captain Mordecai Hask
relationships.description: Lost three games. Took the tax without complaint. Guts.

history.reason: Played three games, lost all three, took the debuffs without complaint (Session 32)

unlocks.reward: Hask offers a rematch with better odds

relationships.name: Hesta Draal
relationships.description: Poured ale on his arm instead of drinking it. Didn't ask.

relationships.name: Aedwynn the Maker
relationships.description: She remembers what the Shadar-kai are. She made them. She gave you back your face.
dislikes: Treating the boons as a contract
Acting as her instrument without thought

history.reason: First Maker-bound hexblade in 2,000 years; the figment severed the Aral-Vyn pact, restored your original Shadar-kai face, and bound a new pact in pale gold light

unlocks.reward: Replacement boons for Excision and Sinew Wrought begin to manifest
The Maker attends you in dream

relationships.name: Galheran the Unmoved
relationships.description: He called you a powerless dog and meant it. After the renunciation, he stepped aside without comment. The hatred has not left him, but it is no longer aimed at you.
dislikes: Anything bearing a Sovereign pact, brand, or correction
Walking past the Maker's door without his leave

history.reason: Galheran rose against you on sight, called you "Bastard... Dog of Valdyrian... USURPER!", and put you on the floor in seconds. Sol's intervention kept the second blow from landing.

After the renunciation: you came back into the chamber, knelt, peeled off the grafted face yourself, and renounced your Sovereign aloud. Galheran was taken aback. He had put you on the floor an hour earlier; this was not what he had been bracing for. He stepped aside and let you walk past him into the Maker's chamber. Not friendship. Not warmth. But the door is no longer closed to you.

unlocks.reward: Galheran will speak to you without the eye-lights flaring
Galheran will hear a question from you, once

relationships.name: Rosa Solt
relationships.description: Standing offer extended. Eighth-and-ninth-bell, any evening this week.
likes: Operatives spending social capital on each other
Guests who arrive on their own initiative

unlocks.reward: Rosa names a Drennan client who matters

history.reason: Spent social capital on Fursen's behalf — moved her from 'not interested' to 'interested enough to extend the offer to both of you.' (Session 37)

relationships.name: Veshik
relationships.description: Greenskin thief. I have your face now, and the Watch has your name.

history.reason: Stole the silver ring from his shop (S40)
Provoked the inconvenience-fee dispute at booking

relationships.name: Korven Strake
relationships.description: No shortage of your kind in the Kennels. Game is game - and I have been let into one.

history.reason: House Selvik opened a recovery contract on him (S40)
Hunted down, caught one-handed, walked to the cells

relationships.name: House Selvik
relationships.description: Old thief-flag, but two clean closes and now a third. A useful contract operator. The ink's earned.
dislikes: A mess made of the House name

history.reason: Watch flag + House mark after the Salvager's Square pot (S40)
87 gp claimed against him at the Threshold House
Closed the lost-caravan Orange clean - found the cause, recovered the manifest, no survivors to fault them for (the Husk King; S43)

relationships.name: Captain Jawbone
relationships.description: Called worse by smaller. You paid. You walk. Door's behind you.

history.reason: Caught palming the ring for a pebble at booking (S40)
Called him a 'metal-jawed freak' on the way out

relationships.name: Naya Selvik
relationships.description: Interesting. Not pressing. Watch.
likes: Becoming worth more bought than hunted

history.reason: Logged on the Selvik file: 'interesting, not pressing. Watch.' (S40)

relationships.name: Vex
relationships.description: They all say they'll be back. You'll mean it.

history.reason: First session with Vex at the Silken Refuge (S41)
She extended a standing invitation

relationships.name: Marek
relationships.description: The stone was good and you were almost polite. Bring me the next one.

history.reason: Sold the emerald pendant fairly; Marek invited future business (S41)

relationships.name: Marrek Voss
relationships.description: Six? All of them? Right. You ever need a place east, the byre's open.
likes: A job seen through to the end

history.reason: Cleared the Brackish Pool den menacing his pastures (S41)

relationships.name: Broma
relationships.description: Stitching was gone at your back. Fixed it. Don't swing from the shoulder.

history.reason: Bought a fitted studded-leather set (S41)

relationships.name: The Dealer
relationships.description: Same question. What do you want, or what do you want me to find.
dislikes: Bringing the Watch to his door

history.reason: First visit to the Green Door; bought the Dagger of Throwing (S41)
Returning customer - 'the little knife that comes home again'; haggled the Cloak of Protection from 200 down to 180 gp and the Dealer let him (S42)

relationships.name: Velvet Thorn
relationships.description: The mark's on your file. I won't turn you in. I won't protect you either.

history.reason: Paying guest at the Velvet Thorn (third-floor suite) (S40-41)
Returned road-worn; keys set out without a word (S42)

relationships.name: Lord Theron Vander
relationships.description: You're the strangers who knocked. Bring my son back.

history.reason: Among the crew that brought House Vander the Twin Reach discovery (S41)

relationships.name: Tarrin Vander
relationships.description: You showed me how the road is done.
dislikes: Being coddled like a fragile heir

history.reason: Completed the Twin Reach contract - opened the vault, faced Halric, and brought two of the family's dead home: Halric and the never-born child (S42)

relationships.name: Veshra Coil
relationships.description: This is a house with rules, dear. You kept them.
likes: Honesty about what a guest wants

history.reason: Well-behaved paying client on the trio's first real Refuge night (S42)

relationships.name: Mor
relationships.description: Come again.
likes: Clients who let her set the pace
Goblins who know when to stop arguing

history.reason: A client she enjoyed - she kept control of every second and meant the 'come again' (S42)

relationships.name: Delvin
relationships.description: Brought the boy home. Obliged, sirs.

history.reason: Shared the road and the vault fight; he spent the heir's medical supplies stabilising the downed; the boy came home (S42)

relationships.name: Maren Thane
relationships.description: I reopened a door that closed before its time. You walked back through it. Mind that you were worth the reopening.
likes: Honesty about how a death came
dislikes: The rites treated as a mere service

history.reason: Maren judged his death 'not owed' (killed by the Husk King, a thing that should not have existed) and reopened the door - raised him from the dead for 500 gp + the account of the King (S43)

unlocks.reward: Maren shares a quiet truth of the Threshold

relationships.name: Captain Vask
relationships.description: Greedy and armed. I can work with greedy and armed. The pious ones get me killed.
dislikes: Being asked to linger somewhere dangerous

history.reason: Hired her one-way to the scatter-isles beneath Elysra - 'treasure and hunting' (S43)

relationships.name: Karusa
relationships.description: The big one. You were there when the iron came off. I'll keep up.
likes: Being treated as a person, not a rescue
dislikes: Prying into a past she won't discuss

history.reason: One of the three who freed her from the Sallow Compound; she walks with the party and defers to him as she does the others (S46)
Helped outfit her at Jorik's Forge; she travels armed as one of the company now (S47)

relationships.name: Inquisitor Marek
relationships.type: Veinspire — Church of the Vein war-priest
relationships.description: Then we're the same, you and me. Best pull I've had in a year.
dislikes: Cleverness used to dodge a fair fight

history.reason: Beat Farkas at arm-wrestling in a Veinspire rest-house (a real contest), adopted him as a friend for life, and let him in on the guard's strength-worm (S47)

relationships.name: Sister Perla
relationships.type: Veinspire — Church of the Vein cleric
relationships.description: A big heart like yours — she'd feel you a mile off. Come back and be kept.
likes: A soul open to the Mother
dislikes: Refusing the gift out of hand

history.reason: Farkas came to her church curious about the veins; she taught him gladly and offered to start him toward the arterial baptism (S47)

relationships.name: Jorik Stave
relationships.description: That's old work. Older than it looks.
likes: Knowing what a weapon is for

history.reason: Fair custom — bought Karusa's kit off him (40 gp); Jorik clocked the Skyfather's Reckoning as serious ancient work (S47)

relationships.name: Broma
relationships.description: Won't sing for you the way the thing on your back does. But it's yours, and so am I now.

history.reason: Won the hand-forged war-maul at 20 gp on a nat-20; Broma added free lifetime maintenance (S41)

relationships.name: Velvet Thorn
relationships.description: The questions were worth the room.

history.reason: Comped a room for the good Ashford questions (S40)
A returning face at the bar she has decided she likes
Returned road-worn; keys set out without a word (S42)

relationships.name: Marrek Voss
relationships.description: Didn't ask what was in the canvas. Didn't need to. The byre's open.
likes: A job seen through to the end

history.reason: Cleared the Brackish Pool den (S41)

relationships.name: Captain Jawbone
relationships.description: Half-giant's sat on my flagstones. Three strangers don't share an afternoon by accident.

history.reason: Accidentally exposed the goblin's lie; filed as a bystander (S40)

relationships.name: Lord Theron Vander
relationships.description: Bring my son back.

history.reason: Among the crew that brought the Twin Reach discovery (S41)

relationships.name: Kettleback
relationships.description: Change is clean. Rooms are up the stair.

history.reason: Lodged and drank at the Common Cup (S40)

relationships.name: House Selvik
relationships.description: Contract crew. Three closes. Reliable muscle on the Wall.
dislikes: A mess made of the House name

history.reason: Closed two Roll contracts in three days (Bonefield, Brackish Pool) (S40-41)
Closed the lost-caravan Orange clean - found the cause, recovered the manifest, no survivors to fault them for (the Husk King; S43)

relationships.name: Torvin Drennan
relationships.description: Half-giant with a pre-Usurpation maul. Catalogued. I'll choose my moment.

history.reason: Catalogued in House Drennan's operational file (S40)

relationships.name: Tarrin Vander
relationships.description: You showed me how the road is done.
dislikes: Being coddled like a fragile heir

history.reason: Completed the Twin Reach contract - opened the vault, faced Halric, and brought two of the family's dead home: Halric and the never-born child (S42)

relationships.name: Veshra Coil
relationships.description: This is a house with rules, dear. You kept them.
likes: Honesty about what a guest wants

history.reason: A first-timer who minded the house rules (S42)

relationships.name: Veil
relationships.description: All patience and suggestion.

history.reason: His first session - masked, silent, patient; he left without words for it (S42)

relationships.name: Delvin
relationships.description: Brought the boy home. Obliged, sirs.

history.reason: Shared the road and the vault fight; he spent the heir's medical supplies stabilising the downed; the boy came home (S42)

relationships.name: Maren Thane
relationships.description: You carried the small one to me and paid the work its due. The Threshold remembers a debt kept.
likes: Honesty about how a death came
dislikes: The rites treated as a mere service

history.reason: Helped bring Ratsby's body to the Threshold; paid the offering and gave the account; witnessed the rite (S43)

unlocks.reward: Maren shares a quiet truth of the Threshold

relationships.name: Captain Vask
relationships.description: Greedy and armed. I can work with greedy and armed. The pious ones get me killed.
dislikes: Being asked to linger somewhere dangerous

history.reason: Crossed to the scatter-isles on Vask's boat; an unexpectedly tireless hand for a passenger (S43)

relationships.name: Kira Vost
relationships.description: You swing like the swing is the whole plan. But you made me work. Most don't. Come to the Garrison.
likes: A student who earns the lesson
Being made to work for a win

history.reason: Sparred the Varn training master at the Kennels yard - lost a good, hard bout; she named his flaw and opened a door to the Garrison (S43)

unlocks.reward: Kira offers Company training / a place to test himself

relationships.name: Oo'ro'vae
relationships.description: The three off the Span. Buyers, trouble, or chain-bait - I haven't decided which yet.
likes: Taking no more than the coast can give

history.reason: Fair first dealing at the Yard; clocked as 'the three off the Span' and given his standing salvage offer, no trouble (S45)

unlocks.reward: Oo'ro'vae opens the log - the route home and which wrecks are live

relationships.name: Oo'lha'ne
relationships.description: That's old work. Giant-work. And it answers to you - not your arm, you.
dislikes: Coin or threats in place of patience

history.reason: Climbed to his perch and listened; he read the Skyfather's Reckoning as ancient giant-work that answers to Farkas and holds half-words of a dead tongue (S45)

relationships.name: Vassek Holloweye
relationships.description: You saw a man buying people quietly and chose to stand with him. From that, I let you in.
likes: Weighing what a move costs the powerless
dislikes: Trading the weak for a fast gain
Recklessness that draws the wrong eyes

history.reason: Read what Vassek really does - shelters slaves off the chain - and stood with him instead of blowing it open before the Keeper's town; he made the trio allies (S45)

unlocks.reward: Vassek moves people, papers, and quiet coin for the party
Vassek considers them for the thread of mercy he must one day hand on

relationships.name: The Hollowsong
relationships.description: The three off the Span came back from the floe. Welcomed at the Hearthhold now.
likes: Standing against what preys on the cast-down
Respect for how little the coast has
dislikes: Drawing the chains down on the town
Loud outsiders who draw the sky's eye

history.reason: Returned to the Underkeel from the western floe and the Span dive; Vo'la'me welcomed them at the Hearthhold and asked no questions (S45)

relationships.name: Sael
relationships.description: Came up the chain asking after books. Worth remembering.
likes: Curiosity about what a paper really says

history.reason: Fair trade at the Square; the trio bought the unreadable 'ledger' Sael couldn't place - a Sylvan journal (S45)

relationships.name: Hesta Draal
relationships.description: Four who paid on time and kept the rule. That's rarer than it should be.

history.reason: Based at the Thorn and Nail through S46-47 - kept her rule, paid fair, and left clean

relationships.name: Lord Theron Vander
relationships.description: That's our mark. I can't pretend otherwise. Bring my son back.

history.reason: Delivered the Twin Reach discovery personally; Theron entrusted his son to the crew (S41)

relationships.name: Broma
relationships.description: Back for another oil change, metal man?

history.reason: Long-standing maintenance client of Broma's ('the metal man') (S41)

relationships.name: Marrek Voss
relationships.description: All of them? This creature won't be a problem any longer.
likes: A job seen through to the end

history.reason: Cleared the Brackish Pool den; confirmed the lineage terminated (S41)

relationships.name: Captain Jawbone
relationships.description: Iron-man fought clean and won the upset. Gave a clean statement. Filed.

history.reason: Gave a clean witness statement and disavowed the goblin honestly (S40)

relationships.name: House Selvik
relationships.description: Contract crew, three closes. The pre-Usurpation chest stays an open note, but the work is good.
dislikes: A mess made of the House name

history.reason: Closed two Roll contracts in three days (S40-41)
Selvik flagged his pre-Usurpation chest-glow for later interest
Closed the lost-caravan Orange clean - found the cause, recovered the manifest, no survivors to fault them for (the Husk King; S43)

relationships.name: Korven Strake
relationships.description: Your stare is not a thing I am impressed by. But your chest is worth a note.
dislikes: Getting between him and a mark

history.reason: Korven filed his pre-Usurpation chest-glow for House Selvik (S40)

relationships.name: Velvet Thorn
relationships.description: The iron one sleeps in the corner and watches. Reads as quietly attentive.

history.reason: Sleeps in the corner of the bar; Velvet reads him as watchful (S40-41)
Returned road-worn; keys set out without a word (S42)

relationships.name: Torvin Drennan
relationships.description: Warforged with pre-Usurpation chest-components. Catalogued. I'll choose my moment.

history.reason: Catalogued in House Drennan's operational file (S40)

relationships.name: Vex
relationships.description: You. Iron one. You haven't moved. That's professional. Come learn, next time.

history.reason: Observed the room at the Silken Refuge; Vex invited him to learn (S41)

relationships.name: Tarrin Vander
relationships.description: You showed me how the road is done.
dislikes: Being coddled like a fragile heir

history.reason: Completed the Twin Reach contract - opened the vault, faced Halric, and brought two of the family's dead home: Halric and the never-born child (S42)

relationships.name: Veshra Coil
relationships.description: This is a house with rules, dear. You kept them.
likes: Honesty about what a guest wants

history.reason: Put an honest, unusual request to her - a standing leave to study her workers (2 gp); accepted her consent-rule and held to it the same night (S42)

relationships.name: Mor
relationships.description: Park it in the parlour and let it rust where I don't have to hear it.
likes: Clients who let her set the pace
Goblins who know when to stop arguing

history.reason: Tried to observe her session under the Veshra arrangement; refused flat (S42)

relationships.name: Delvin
relationships.description: Brought the boy home. Obliged, sirs.

history.reason: Shared the road and the vault fight; he spent the heir's medical supplies stabilising the downed; the boy came home (S42)

relationships.name: Maren Thane
relationships.description: You knew where the dead of this city go, and to whom. That is a rarer thing to know than most reckon.
likes: Honesty about how a death came
dislikes: The rites treated as a mere service

history.reason: Recalled the Mother-of-rites and led the party to her with Ratsby's body; paid the offering and gave the account (S43)

unlocks.reward: Maren shares a quiet truth of the Threshold

relationships.name: Captain Vask
relationships.description: Greedy and armed. I can work with greedy and armed. The pious ones get me killed.
dislikes: Being asked to linger somewhere dangerous

history.reason: Crossed to the scatter-isles on Vask's boat (S43)

relationships.name: Karusa
relationships.description: You paid full price and struck the iron in a back lane. That's not how buyers behave. I pay what I owe.
likes: Being treated as a person, not a rescue
dislikes: Prying into a past she won't discuss

history.reason: Bought her off the Sallow Compound showroom for 350 gp and struck the collar off in a back lane, asking nothing in return; she walks with him by debt and cold arithmetic, not gratitude (S46)
Bought her first real kit at Jorik's Forge; she rides north as one of their own (S47)

unlocks.reward: Karusa opens what she knows of the Collar from the inside - pens, grading, routes, the Compound's rhythms

relationships.name: Oo'ro'vae
relationships.description: Watched before he spoke. Reads as fair, and poor, and honest about both.
likes: Taking no more than the coast can give

history.reason: Fair first dealing at the Yard; bought a fish, made no trouble, and was clocked as one of 'the three off the Span' (S45)

unlocks.reward: Oo'ro'vae opens the log - the route home and which wrecks are live

relationships.name: Oo'lha'ne
relationships.description: Tell me about the warm place. The hot one. I'd like to hear what the other thing sounds like.
dislikes: Coin or threats in place of patience

history.reason: Paid the hermit in the only coin he wanted - a first-hand account of warm Aethkharul, told to a man who has known nothing but cold; he listened to all of it (S45)

relationships.name: Vassek Holloweye
relationships.description: Your oath flared at the collared folk - and you still didn't draw on the clamps in front of the Keeper's town. That told me what you were.
likes: Weighing what a move costs the powerless
dislikes: Trading the weak for a fast gain
Recklessness that draws the wrong eyes

history.reason: His Oath of Vengeance flared at the collared folk of the Ember; he held, read what Vassek truly does - shelters slaves off the chain - and stood with him. The work aligns with his oath; Vassek made him an ally (S45)

unlocks.reward: Vassek opens his rescue to Veezara's Crimson Chain arc - the ones in Renik Sallow's pens
Vassek offers him the thread of mercy to carry on

relationships.name: The Hollowsong
relationships.description: The sun-blood came back off the floe. Vo'la'me pours for him without being asked.
likes: Standing against what preys on the cast-down
Respect for how little the coast has
dislikes: Drawing the chains down on the town
Loud outsiders who draw the sky's eye

history.reason: Returned to the Underkeel from the western floe; Vo'la'me welcomed the sun-blood and poured for him unasked (S45)

relationships.name: Sael
relationships.description: Came up the chain asking after books. One of the three.
likes: Curiosity about what a paper really says

history.reason: Present for the fair trade at the Square; the trio bought the Sylvan journal off the stall (S45)

relationships.name: Hesta Draal
relationships.description: Four who paid on time and kept the rule. That's rarer than it should be.

history.reason: Based at the Thorn and Nail through S46-47 - kept her rule, paid fair, and left clean

relationships.name: Karusa
relationships.description: The one with the stone that won't go quiet. You were there when the iron came off.
likes: Being treated as a person, not a rescue
dislikes: Prying into a past she won't discuss

history.reason: One of the three who freed her from the Sallow Compound; she walks with the party and defers to him as she does the others (S46)
Party outfitted her at Jorik's Forge; she keeps pace as one of the company now (S47)

relationships.name: Thessaly
relationships.type: Veinspire — the Frayed Codex, keeper of forbidden knowledge
relationships.description: Take it. Forty years it's sat there refusing me. I want it out of my store anyway.
likes: Something she has never seen before

history.reason: Read the first page of her forty-year unreadable Abyssal book; she gave it to him — wanted it out of her store anyway (S47)

relationships.name: Oo'ro'vae
relationships.description: That's more than it's worth. The catch is poor and you're paying for wanting it. Your coin.
likes: Taking no more than the coast can give

history.reason: Bought three jars of deep-caught tentacle (14 gp) at the Yard; Oo'ro'vae read the Black Catalyst under his skin without flinching and told him plainly the catch was overpriced - honest against his own sale (S45)

unlocks.reward: Oo'ro'vae opens the log - the route home and which wrecks are live

relationships.name: Oo'lha'ne
relationships.description: Read as a man carrying something wrong. Weighed it, decided it was Viktor's problem, and moved on.
dislikes: Coin or threats in place of patience

history.reason: Climbed to the cliff-perch and listened; the hermit weighed the Black Catalyst without alarm and read Farkas's maul for the party (S45)

relationships.name: Vassek Holloweye
relationships.description: You saw a man buying people quietly and chose to stand with him. From that, I let you in.
likes: Weighing what a move costs the powerless
dislikes: Trading the weak for a fast gain
Recklessness that draws the wrong eyes

history.reason: Read what Vassek really does - shelters slaves off the chain - and stood with him instead of exposing him before the Keeper's town; Vassek made the trio allies (S45)

unlocks.reward: Vassek moves people, papers, and quiet coin for the party
Vassek considers them for the thread of mercy he must one day hand on

relationships.name: The Hollowsong
relationships.description: Welcomed back from the floe - though Vo'la'me eyes the stone he carries.
likes: Standing against what preys on the cast-down
Respect for how little the coast has
dislikes: Drawing the chains down on the town
Loud outsiders who draw the sky's eye

history.reason: Returned to the Underkeel from the western floe; Vo'la'me welcomed the trio but stays warier of him and the stone he carries (S45)

relationships.name: Sael
relationships.description: Named my unreadable ledger for what it was. Come back when you can read it - I'm curious too.
likes: Curiosity about what a paper really says

history.reason: Bought the unreadable 'ledger' for 20 gp and named it - a Sylvan homesick journal Sael could forge a hand from but not read; left a door open to the stall once it can be read (S45)

relationships.name: Hesta Draal
relationships.description: Four who paid on time and kept the rule. That's rarer than it should be.

history.reason: Based at the Thorn and Nail through S46-47 - kept her rule, paid fair, and left clean

relationships.name: Inquisitor Marek
relationships.description: Black in the veins. That's not the Mother's work. Keep your distance, warlock.
dislikes: Cleverness used to dodge a fair fight

history.reason: Recoiled from the black veins under Viktor's skin and called it near heresy (S47)
